SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.controller

Class OrganizationController

java.lang.Object
it.unipi.tonightscall.controller.OrganizationController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/organization") public class OrganizationController extends Object
REST Controller handling operations specific to Organization.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • OrganizationController

      public OrganizationController(OrganizationService organizationService, OrganizerService organizerService, OrganizationRepository organizationRepository, OrganizerRepository organizerRepository)

  • Method Details

    • request

      @PostMapping("/request") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> request(@RequestBody Map<String,String> organizationId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Registers an Organizer's new Request to join an Organization
      Parameters:
      organizationId - The id of the Organization.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity "OK" entity, or an error message otherwise.

    • getAllOrganizations

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getAllOrganizations(@RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Function that returns all the Organizations
      Parameters:
      page - the page number that you need
      Returns:
      A responseEntity With the requested Page or an error

    • getOrganizationById

      @GetMapping("/me") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getOrganizationById(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Get the organization that logged
      Parameters:
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the organization or an error

    • accept

      @PostMapping("/accept") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> accept(@RequestBody Map<String,String> newMemberId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Accepts a join Request of an Organizer.
      Parameters:
      newMemberId - The id of the Organizer who asked to join the Organization.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizationDTO, or an error message otherwise.

    • updateOrganization

      @PutMapping("/update") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> updateOrganization(@RequestBody OrganizationDTO organizationDTO, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Updated an Organization data.
      Parameters:
      organizationDTO - The OrganizationDTO containing the updated data.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizationDTO, or an error message otherwise.

    • deleteRequest

      @DeleteMapping("/request/{orgUsername}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> deleteRequest(@PathVariable String orgUsername, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Deletes an Organizer Request to join the Organization.
      Parameters:
      orgUsername - The Organizer Username whose Request to join must be refused.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizationDTO, or an error message otherwise.

    • analyzeOrganization

      @GetMapping("/analyze") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> analyzeOrganization(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Retrieves a performance analysis for an organization.

      This endpoint provides a comparison between the total events hosted by the organization and the individual event counts for each associated organizer.

      Parameters:
      authentication - The security context of the logged-in organization.
      Returns:
      A list of analysis data objects, or an error message if the entity is not an organization.
